latin: Eheu! Homerus caput suum percussit et clamavit. hoc verbum semper dicebat cum aliquid mali accidebat — quod saepe fiebat.

questions.prompt: What did Homer do when something went wrong?
How often did bad things happen to Homer?

translation: D'oh! Homer struck his head and exclaimed. He always said this word when something bad happened — which happened often.
